name: @joehe71/browser-tools
description: Browser automation tools for Finch, powered by agent-browser (Vercel Labs).

finch.name: Agent Browser
finch.description: Control a real browser from Finch: navigate, click, fill, screenshot, read page content, and more — powered by agent-browser (Vercel Labs).
finch.systemPrompt: When the user needs to interact with a web page, scrape content, take screenshots, fill forms, or automate browser tasks, use the agent-browser tools. Each tool wraps the agent-browser CLI. If agent-browser is not installed, guide the user to install it first with `npm install -g agent-browser && agent-browser install`.

promptGuides.title: Set up Agent Browser
promptGuides.description: Install agent-browser and download Chrome for browser automation.
promptGuides.prompt: /browser_install Install agent-browser CLI and set up Chrome for browser automation.

promptGuides.title: Scrape a webpage
promptGuides.description: Navigate to a URL and extract its readable content.
promptGuides.prompt: /browser_navigate open https://example.com and /browser_read get the page content
